command:
python -u -c 
import csv
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('tasks/t0010_hunt_missed_dsgc_models/data/candidates.csv')
with p.open() as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)
print('total rows:', len(rows))
print('fields:', reader.fieldnames)
high = [r for r in rows if r['priority']=='high']
print('high-priority rows:', len(high))
for r in high:
    print('  ', r['candidate_id'], '->', r['port_attempt_status'])
not_attempted = [r for r in rows if r['priority']!='high']
for r in not_attempted:
    assert r['port_attempt_status'] == 'not_attempted', r
    assert r['port_failure_phase'] == '' and r['port_failure_reason'] == '' and r['library_asset_slug'] == '' and r['tuning_curve_csv_path'] == '', r
print('not_attempted block looks good; count =', len(not_attempted))
